entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's company; technical strategy should focus on measuring agency for talent arbitrage

entities.name: proxy for agency
entities.context: Framework to identify and unlock high-potential invisible talent; primary competitive advantage in hiring

entities.name: agency
entities.context: The capacity to act independently and effectively; requires high-fidelity data to measure

entities.name: invisible talent
entities.context: The 70% of high-potential talent not captured by standard resume/prestige signals

entities.name: visible signals
entities.context: Prestige titles and resumes representing only 30% of talent pool; low-resolution heuristics

entities.name: value investing
entities.context: Analogy for finding assets whose intrinsic value is not reflected in current market signals

entities.name: recruitment market inefficiency
entities.context: Core thesis: market over-indexes on visible signals causing crowded trade for small talent subset

relationships.context: Technical strategy should focus on developing this to identify hidden talent
